info.title: AVxcelerate Explore & Analyze
info.description: This is the REST API for the Explore and Analyze application that is part of the Ansys AVxcelerate Autonomous Driving Toolchain.

tags.name: Logical Scenario
tags.description: Endpoints to manage logical scenarios and associated data

tags.name: Monitoring
tags.description: Endpoints to monitor the health of the services

tags.name: TSA-job
tags.description: The endpoints that manage the configuration and status of the tsa-job in the Explore and Analyze application.

tags.name: Simulation Reports
tags.description: The endpoints used to generate simulation reports

tags.name: Airflow Pipeline
tags.description: The endpoints used to trigger a test-space analytics run with Airflow.

tags.name: SUT Configuration
tags.description: This section is not used in this REST API, please use the dedicated SUT REST API to manage SUT endpoints

parameters.description: The parameters of this LogicalScenario.

file_format.description: File format of concrete scenario file

user_data.description: User data for the logical scenario.

label.description: User friendly label for this parameter.

unit.description: The unit of this ParameterDescription if applicable

default_value.description: The default value for this parameter

id.description: The unique identifier of this constraint

rule.description: Rule to be applied on the constraint

formula.description: Formula to be implemented in constraint

group.description: Index of the corresponding constraint group (0-indexed)

label.description: User friendly label for this KPI

data_type.description: The data type of this KPI

unit.description: The unit of this KPI if applicable

id.description: Auto generated id of the group

name.description: User defined unique name of the group

description.description: User defined description of the group

source_id.description: Source of Truth for the group.

id.description: Auto generated id of the group type

name.description: User defined unique name of the group type

description.description: User defined description of the group type

duration.description: Duration in seconds taken to complete task

execution_date.description: DateTime when Job iteration was submitted for execution

queued_dttm.description: DateTime when task was queued for execution

source.description: Source from where job was created.

total_samples.description: Total number of samples for this Job.

operator_config.description: The operator config of this Job.

user_id.description: User name of the user who created the job

kpi_json_present.description: Flag to determine if KPI file is uploaded

comment.description: Comment added by user when job was created

limit.description: Number of records to return in the response

offset.description: Starting index to return the records from(offset value or the number of records to skip)

total.description: The total number of TSA Jobs

type.description: Type of the change: only relative supported

chunks.description: List of chunks for the job

kpis.description: List of kpis and related metadata

parameters.description: List of parameters and related metadata

samples.description: List of samples for the chunk

sample_status.description: List of task status for this sample

safe.description: Tells if the sample if safe (True) or unsafe (False) with respect to failure_state KPI

sample_params.description: Name value pairs of parameters for this sample

kpi_results.description: Name value pairs of kpis for this sample

completed_time.description: Time at which the task for this sample was complete

status.description: Status of the task for this sample

label.description: User friendly label for this Parameter

unit.description: The unit of this Parameter if applicable

constant_type.description: Treat constant parameters as given data type

discrete_type.description: Treat discrete parameters as given data type

discrete_values.description: The discrete values of this ParameterBounds.

parameter_bounds.description: Dictionary with parameter name as key and parameter_bounds data as value.

source.description: Source from where this job is getting created.

skip_error_injection.description: Skip Error Injection step or not

comment.description: Comment added by user when job was created

file_format.description: File format of concrete scenario file

parameter_bounds.description: Dictionary with parameter name as key and parameter_bounds data as value.

parameter_correlations.description: List of all pair-wise parameter correlations.

x.description: The name of the first parameter to be correlated.

y.description: The name of the second parameter to be correlated.

value.description: The correlation between the two parameters.

error_injection.description: The error_injection config of CustomConfigs of this TsaConfig

target.description: Executable inside the release container to run the simulation with the ad function.

ParseError.description: When a mask can't be parsed

MaskError.description: When any error occurs on mask
